overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban street, crossing the road, and exploring a homeless encampment beneath a large metal geodesic stadium. The scene features bright daylight, futuristic industrial architecture, and detailed environmental storytelling with graffiti and makeshift shelters.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with stadium view

events.description: begins crossing the street from the corner

agents.ego_description: walking across the asphalt road toward the sidewalk on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: man in grey shirt crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: teal and black electrical equipment cabinet on the sidewalk corner
tall pole with traffic signal and pedestrian crossing light
large spherical metal lattice structure dominating the skyline
multi-story industrial building with grid-patterned facade
several vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a sunny urban street corner with a large electrical utility box and traffic light. The camera crosses the asphalt road, passing a pedestrian, with a massive metal geodesic stadium structure visible in the distance and a modern grey industrial building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with green railings approaching stadium

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk from the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk next to green metal railings

entered.detail: series of green painted metal barriers separating sidewalk from street
paved pedestrian walkway with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk bordered by green metal railings, with the massive stadium structure growing larger ahead. The grey industrial building remains on the left while the street drops away to the right, creating an open corridor toward the stadium.

events.description: enters the narrow encampment area with tents and debris

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the cluttered encampment space

entered.detail: construction barriers with alternating orange and white stripes
makeshift shelters with tarps and poles
scattered cardboard pieces and trash littering the concrete ground
concrete wall with large text reading When did we agree to BE IMPRISONED?

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows into a confined encampment passage beneath the stadium structure. Orange and white construction barriers line the left while tents and makeshift shelters appear on the right. A prominent graffiti wall asks When did we agree to BE IMPRISONED? as debris litters the concrete path.

events.description: approaches two people sitting on a couch in the encampment

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe the two people sitting on the couch in the encampment

notable_agents.action: two squatters sitting on a worn couch, one relaxing with legs crossed and one leaning forward

entered.detail: dirty upholstered sofa placed against the graffiti wall
black plastic pallet used as a coffee table with food containers on top

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a makeshift living space where two squatters sit on a worn couch against the graffiti-covered wall. A pallet serves as a table with food containers scattered about. The space is cluttered with cardboard, trash bags, and debris, creating an intimate view of encampment life.

events.description: passes the couch area revealing more tents and additional graffiti

agents.ego_description: continuing through the encampment past tents and shelters

entered.detail: wall with spray-painted text reading EARTH BLOOD
makeshift bed covered with green tarpaulin and wooden posts
camping tent with blue and white fabric

segments.scene_description: Moving past the couch area, the camera reveals more of the encampment including a green tarp shelter and blue tent. New graffiti reading EARTH BLOOD appears on the left wall. The path continues toward the street visible ahead, with the stadium structure reappearing in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban intersection into the claustrophobic confines of a makeshift encampment beneath a massive structure. It begins at a sunny street corner by an electrical utility box, crossing the asphalt road past a pedestrian toward a distant metal geodesic stadium. As the camera moves along a concrete sidewalk bordered by green railings, the industrial building on the left recedes and the stadium grows larger, dominating the horizon. The scene then narrows as the camera enters a confined passage beneath the stadium, where the open street gives way to orange construction barriers and a cluster of tents. Finally, the path becomes littered with debris, passing a graffiti-covered wall that asks when the inhabitants agreed to be imprisoned.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cluttered homeless encampment that gradually opens up toward a distant urban skyline. It begins with an intimate approach toward a makeshift living space, passing two squatters seated on a worn couch amidst scattered food containers and debris against a graffiti-covered wall. As the camera moves past this living area, the environment expands to reveal a series of green tarp shelters and blue tents. The scene then shifts toward the exit of the camp, passing a wall marked with the words EARTH BLOOD before the path opens up toward the street. Finally, the view extends outward, bringing the massive industrial structure of the stadium back into focus in the distance.
